name: OnAREthClosedIPv6TCPConnection, OnAREthClosedIPv4TCPConnection, OnAREthClosedTCPConnection
title: OnAREthClosedIPv6TCPConnection, OnAREthClosedIPv4TCPConnection, OnAREthClosedTCPConnection
syntax: void OnAREthClosedIPv6TCPConnection(byte localIPv6Address[], dword localPort, byte remoteIPv6Address[], dword remotePort); // form 1
void OnAREthClosedIPv4TCPConnection(dword localIPv4Address, dword localPort, dword remoteIPv4Address, dword remotePort); // form 2
void OnAREthClosedTCPConnection(IP_Endpoint localIPEndpoint, IP_Endpoint remoteIPEndpoint); // form 3
description: This callback will be called after a IL’s TCP connection has been closed.

parameters.name: localIPEndpoint
parameters.description: Object of type IP_Endpoint that contains the address/port of the local endpoint.

parameters.name: remoteIPEndpoint
parameters.description: Object of type IP_Endpoint that contains the address/port of the remote endpoint.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
